Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dirk D. Larsen, Esq. and Linda Meyer, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630, for defendant and moving party;
David G. Yen, Esq. and Robert E. Cartwright, Jr., Esq. of the Cartwright Law Firm, Tel. 415.433.0444, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. After argument, the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied for reasons stated on the record. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that complies with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
